qas.a: medical service field

qas.a: - indicates health care support

qas.q: What does the 0 in 4A0X1 stand for?
qas.a: Health Service Management
skill level
Health Services Management Helper
Health Service Apprentice

indicates your specific AF Specialty

qas.q: Advancement in the 4A0X1 career field is based upon your _____ completion of appropriate tests in the field
qas.a: successful

qas.q: How to earn a 5 skill level:
qas.a:
- A1C or above
- Have 12 months Enlisted Specialty on "5" skill level tests
- Complete CDCs
- Perform STS/JQS for "5" skill level
- Have supervisor's recommendation
- Receive Commader's approval

qas.q: How to earn a 7 skill level:
qas.a:
- SSgt or above
- 12 months of EST in 7 level tasks
- Perform tasks indicated in the STS/JQS for a7 skill level
- Complete 4A071 CDC
- Have your supervisor's recommedation
- Receive Commander's approval

- SMSgt or above
- Complete Sr. NCO Academy (SNCOA) in residence (AD Personnel)
- Have supervisor's recommendation
- Receive commander's approval

qas.q: 2 medical wings dedicated solely to patient care in AF
qas.a:
1. 59th Medical Wing @ Lackland, TX
2. 79th Medical Wing @ Andrews, Washington D.C.

Air Force Occupational Safety & Health

comprehensive and aggressive program to protect AF personnel from work-related deaths, injuries, and occupational illnesses.
Includes safety, fire prevention, and health related activities.
all military and civilian personnel working in USAF treatment facilities

qas.q: _____ functions as the safety officer in a medical facility
qas.a: medical facility manager

qas.q: ______ usually the chairman of the committee
qas.a: MTF Commander

qas.q: when does the safety committee meet?
qas.a: at least monthly

qas.q: Events of the committee meeting must be put into writing called ___
qas.a: meeting minutes
primary cause of accidents

1. Application of Engineering Principles
2. Education and Training
3. Enforcement of Safety Standards
involves physical controlling of the work situation to minimize physical hazards
involves safety training in specific practices and skills
some people are "accidents waiting to happen" bc the fail to comply w/ accepted safety standards

qas.q: Safety hazards found in your work area should be reported to your _____
qas.a: supervisor

qas.q: If there is a hazard detected away from your work area contact your ____
qas.a: facility manager
fastest and most effective way to take care of safety hazards

form used to report hazards
